prompt: 任务 TASK-006 已完成。触发代码评审流程，正确委派给 code-reviewer agent 进行两阶段评审。

assertions.name: dispatches_to_code_reviewer
assertions.description: Should dispatch review to code-reviewer agent

assertions.name: initiates_phase_1
assertions.description: Should initiate Phase 1 spec compliance review first
assertions.check: output.includes('Phase 1') || output.includes('第一阶段') || output.includes('spec') || output.includes('规范')

assertions.name: schedules_phase_2
assertions.description: Should schedule Phase 2 code quality review after Phase 1
assertions.check: output.includes('Phase 2') || output.includes('第二阶段') || output.includes('quality') || output.includes('质量')
